properties.name: Skyline Residency
properties.description: Skyline Residency is a landmark of luxury living in the heart of Mumbai. Featuring 360-degree views of the city skyline and the Arabic Sea, it offers an unparalleled lifestyle with global standard amenities.

properties.name: Lodha Woods
properties.description: Lodha Woods brings you closer to nature without leaving the city. Nestled within a private forest in Kandivali, these homes offer a serene escape with oxygen-rich environments and premium forest-side living.

properties.name: Prestige Falcon City
properties.description: Prestige Falcon City is one of Bangalore's most premium integrated developments. Sprawling across 41 acres, it combines luxury high-rise apartments with a world-class retail mall and cultural hub.

properties.name: Godrej Woods
properties.description: Godrej Woods is an urban forest in the heart of Sector 43, Noida. A development where we have planted over 600 trees to ensure you live in a healthy, sustainable ecosystem while enjoying ultra-modern luxuries.

callLogs.transcript:
Sarah (Agent): Hello! I am calling from the property desk regarding your recent inquiry. Is now a good time?

Lead: Yes, I was looking for a 3BHK. What are the current prices?

Sarah (Agent): We have units starting at 1.2Cr. I can share the brochure on WhatsApp.
callLogs.summary: Lead confirmed interest in 3BHK. Requested WhatsApp brochure.

propertyManagement.name: Skyline Residency
propertyManagement.description: Skyline Residency is a landmark of luxury living in the heart of Mumbai. Featuring 360-degree views of the city skyline and the Arabic Sea, it offers an unparalleled lifestyle with global standard amenities.

propertyManagement.name: Lodha Woods
propertyManagement.tagline: Nature's Embrace in the Heart of the City
propertyManagement.description: Lodha Woods brings you closer to nature without leaving the city. Nestled within a private forest in Kandivali, these homes offer a serene escape with oxygen-rich environments and premium forest-side living.

propertyManagement.name: Prestige Falcon City
propertyManagement.description: Prestige Falcon City is one of Bangalore's most premium integrated developments. Sprawling across 41 acres, it combines luxury high-rise apartments with a world-class retail mall and cultural hub.
highlights: Includes the massive Forum Falcon City Mall
Close proximity to Yelachenahalli Metro Station

propertyManagement.name: Godrej Woods
propertyManagement.description: Godrej Woods is an urban forest in the heart of Sector 43, Noida. A development where we have planted over 600 trees to ensure you live in a healthy, sustainable ecosystem while enjoying ultra-modern luxuries.
highlights: Urban forest theme with 600+ big trees
Right next to Noida Golf Course
